task: A real, user-reported bug from a live World: a newly-added sticker sat centered on the canvas but could not be dragged, and the layer-order buttons (Back/Backward/Forward/Front) appeared to do nothing. Root cause, traced not guessed: renderer/slideRenderer.js's _pushLayerObject/_layerObjectBboxes accumulator concatenates every World-owned Layer Pack object onto the very end of _lastSceneElements regardless of which of the 5 containership scopes (slide/frame/holder/element/overlay) actually drew it -- but only overlay-scoped objects are genuinely drawn last, on top of everything; slide/frame/holder/element-scoped World objects are drawn earlier in the same render pass, visually behind Scene elements and Story-Author stickers. js/app.js's _hitTestSceneElement reads that array topmost-first (last element wins), so an earlier-scoped, typically-locked World shape was always hit-tested as if it sat on top, silently intercepting clicks/drags meant for an overlapping sticker drawn beneath it. Fixed by tagging each pushed object with its originating target scope and splitting the concatenation: overlay-scoped objects still append after everything (unchanged, verified); every other scope now splices in before Scene elements/Stickers instead of after, restoring hit-testing to match real visual z-order. The second symptom (layer-order buttons) was investigated and found to be a real, disclosed structural limit, not a bug: SceneEngine's sticker-reorder functions only ever reorder relative to other stickers, and with exactly one sticker on the page every button is a correct guarded no-op -- Story stickers and World Layer Pack content are drawn in two separate phases and Order buttons have never crossed that boundary. Verified via two new Playwright reproductions (a direct hit-test id check, and a real end-to-end page.mouse drag confirming the sticker's actual x/y change) plus full regression across the entire existing Creator/Builder/Card-Platform Playwright suite and both goldenBuild.js suites, all passing unchanged. See CLAUDE.md's matching entry for the full account.
